office_does: The sheriff provides patrol, investigation, civil process, and emergency response across the county.
race_blurb: Both candidates emphasize staffing, drugs, transparency, and agency leadership; Church has the more fully corroborated record.

candidates.summary: Sheriff's lieutenant with 28 years in law enforcement emphasizing training, equipment, staffing, professional standards, enforcement, and prevention.
highlights: Combines enforcement against drugs and property crime with evidence-based prevention [S2]

safety.basis: Explicitly combines enforcement with evidence-based prevention.

experience.basis: Long local law-enforcement and current command record.

candidates.summary: Law-enforcement candidate emphasizing patrol coverage, recruiting, training, leadership, transparency, and fentanyl enforcement.
highlights: Calls for greater patrol coverage and recruitment [S2]
Emphasizes enforcement against fentanyl and illegal drugs [S2]

safety.basis: Concrete enforcement-first priorities include patrol expansion and drug enforcement.

experience.basis: Runs on operational priorities, but the dossier does not establish the scope of his record.
